'''mashaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fearologist|fearologist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fearologist|fearologist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mashaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæshægæth|mæshægæth]] || [[word:mæshægæj|mæshægæj]] || [[word:mæshægæsh|mæshægæsh]] || [[word:mæshægæ|mæshægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashashagath|mashashagath]] || [[word:mashashagaj|mashashagaj]] || [[word:mashashagash|mashashagash]] || [[word:mashashaga|mashashaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashagath|mashagath]] || [[word:mashagaj|mashagaj]] || [[word:mashagash|mashagash]] || [[word:mashaga|mashaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashafgath|mashafgath]] || [[word:mashafgaj|mashafgaj]] || [[word:mashafgash|mashafgash]] || [[word:mashafgaf|mashafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mashagatha|mashagatha]] || [[word:mashagaja|mashagaja]] || [[word:mashagasha|mashagasha]] || [[word:mashagaka|mashagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mashagath|mashagath]] || [[word:mashagaj|mashagaj]] || [[word:mashagash|mashagash]] || [[word:mashaga|mashaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mashagathal|mashagathal]] || [[word:mashagajal|mashagajal]] || [[word:mashagashal|mashagashal]] || [[word:mashagakal|mashagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mashagathatha|mashagathatha]] || [[word:mashagajaja|mashagajaja]] || [[word:mashagashasha|mashagashasha]] || [[word:mashagaka|mashagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mashagathan|mashagathan]] || [[word:mashagajan|mashagajan]] || [[word:mashagashan|mashagashan]] || [[word:mashagakan|mashagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mashagathaoro|mashagathaoro]] || [[word:mashagajaoro|mashagajaoro]] || [[word:mashagashaoro|mashagashaoro]] || [[word:mashagakaoro|mashagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
